mapper.sql: apply_id, apply_no, user_id, channel_id, channel_type, apply_name, materials_json, apply_status, audit_remark, audit_user_id, submit_time, audit_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag
mapper.select: select count(1) from jst_channel_auth_apply where del_flag = '0' and user_id = #{userId} and apply_status in ('pending', 'approved')
select from jst_channel_auth_apply where apply_id = #{applyId} and del_flag = '0'

select apply_id, apply_no, user_id, channel_id, channel_type, apply_name, materials_json, apply_status, audit_remark, submit_time, audit_time from jst_channel_auth_apply where del_flag = '0' and user_id = #{userId} order by submit_time desc, apply_id desc

select apply_id, apply_no, user_id, channel_id, channel_type, apply_name, materials_json, apply_status, audit_remark, submit_time, audit_time from jst_channel_auth_apply where apply_id = #{applyId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.update:
update jst_channel_auth_apply set apply_status = #{targetStatus},
channel_id = #{channelId},
audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, audit_user_id = #{auditUserId}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where apply_id = #{applyId} and apply_status = #{expectedStatus} and del_flag = '0'
